project_type: Vite + React 18 + TypeScript SPA with Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and optional Supabase backend
build_system: Vite 5.4, no Docker. Build via npm scripts.
test_framework: No test framework installed. Verification is via TypeScript compilation and Vite build.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc -b --noEmit to check TypeScript. 2. Run npx vite build to confirm production build succeeds.
environment_constraints: Network is OPEN_INTERNET. No Docker needed. Node 22.22.3, npm 11.4.2 pre-installed.
contribution_requirements: Branch is fix/nigerian-images-and-models. All changes go here. Use Pexels CDN for images (pexels helper in src/utils/images.ts). Follow existing component patterns with framer-motion animations, Tailwind classes, and lucide-react icons.
key_patterns: Components use framer-motion for entrance animations. Editable content uses EditableText/EditableImage with SiteContentContext. Admin auth via useAdminAuth() hook. Designs are static in src/data/designs.ts plus custom ones from CustomDesignsContext. Supabase is optional - site works offline. Admin panel at /#admin hash route. Fashion icons (Scissors, Ruler, etc.) from lucide-react used decoratively throughout.
directory_structure: src/components/ - all UI components. src/context/ - React contexts (theme, favorites, custom designs, site content). src/data/ - static design catalog. src/lib/ - Supabase client + auth. src/services/ - design service + Gemini chat. src/utils/ - helpers (chatbot, images, whatsapp, scroll).
